items.name: Chaaya
items.description: Milk tea brewed in a samovar to a fixed ratio. Strong and consistent, every cup.

items.name: Kattan
items.description: Black tea, no milk. Same decoction, diluted with hot water. No frills, nothing added.

items.name: Lime
items.description: Fresh lime with water or soda. If tea isn't your thing, this is.

items.name: Rusk
items.description: Kerala bakery rusk. Sourced fresh, stored airtight, never served soft. Pair it with your Chaaya.

items.name: Le Noodles
items.description: Spiced instant noodles, prepped to a fixed spec. Goes well with a Chaaya.

items.name: Le Upma
items.description: Classic semolina upma from premium premix. Hot and filling.

items.name: Le Kadala
items.description: Sprouted black chickpea or green gram, tempered with mustard, curry leaves, and spices. Warm. Rotates daily. Until it runs out.
